Agility._comment_Scopes: Every scope to migrate, with the area path its items get below the project. An empty AreaPath means the project root. Themes add a leaf below this, per ThemeAreaPaths in mappings.json. List every scope you want: an item whose parent lives in a scope that is not listed is created unparented, with the parent kept as an agility-parent tag. Run CreateAreaPaths after adding one.

AzureDevOps._comment_AdminCredentialTarget: OPTIONAL, only for MaterializeOwners. Names a stored credential for a SEPARATE token with the Member Entitlement Management (write) scope, owned by a Project Collection Administrator, used to add owners to the org as free Stakeholders so they can be assigned. The work-item PAT above cannot do this (it 401s). Resolved from the ADO_ADMIN_PAT env var first, then this target; omit it and MaterializeOwners falls back to CredentialTarget (which will 401 if under scoped).
